reflection.candidate_lesson: When the 30-indicator consensus shows high conviction (>=90%) but green_matches=0 and hist_hr=0%, the current setup has no historical analog and should be sized down or vetoed regardless of conviction strength.
reflection.mechanism: Conviction measures live indicator agreement, but green_matches/hist_hr measure whether this configuration has EVER worked before. AUDNZD shows conv=100% with 13/30 bear but green_matches=0 and hist_hr=0% — this is a novel configuration the institutional flow has never rewarded. High live agreement on an unprecedented pattern is crowd consensus, not edge; it tends to mean-revert against the herd.
reflection.testable_rule: if consensus_conviction >= 0.90 and green_matches == 0 and hist_hr == 0.0: size *= 0.5 (or veto if session != London Grade A)

validation.reason: Rule filters only 0 trades — insufficient sample
